response.justification: Bogdan is a capable generalist engineer with broad language coverage and real high-throughput distributed systems exposure, but the role demands deep specialization in experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, and statistical analysis — none of which appear anywhere in the resume. His current title and demonstrated scope of impact are at the Senior level, well below the Principal/IC6 bar. The active career gap since October 2025 and several short-tenure roles compound the risk profile.
strengths: Multi-language breadth covers several required languages (TypeScript/JavaScript, C++, C#, Java) with production usage across many roles
Demonstrated experience with high-throughput micro-services at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second, showing real distributed systems exposure
Recent AI tooling and agentic workflow work at re:cinq (MCP frameworks, agent infrastructure) shows adaptability to emerging technical paradigms
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience — no A/B testing, feature flagging, experiment assignment, bias detection, or statistical rollout-risk management is mentioned anywhere
Scope of impact remains team- or project-level throughout the career; no evidence of the multi-team systemic influence or cross-organization platform ownership required at Principal/IC6
Career gap since October 2025 combined with multiple roles lasting 6–12 months raises questions about sustained senior-level ownership and delivery continuity
